tiers.note: 3 projects (hack_018, hack_027, hack_041) promoted from tier3 to tier2 via scrape-and-diff template (2026-03-12). All 18 buildable projects have test cases. 12/12 Marketing tests passed.

projects.problemStatement: Manual copy-paste from AI research bot into Excel. Delays delivery of competitor insights.
projects.solutionOverview: Weekly n8n trigger -> AI research -> Excel/Sheets sync -> Gemini synthesis -> Slack brief

buildability.rationale: Needs external AI bot (Cursor) integration. Could partially build with Firecrawl for scraping + Gemini for analysis.
httpRequestWorkarounds: Could use Firecrawl for competitor scraping instead of Cursor

projects.problemStatement: Traditional SEO reporting doesn't cover AI Overviews, Featured Snippets. Multi-hour manual process.
projects.solutionOverview: Schedule -> HTTP Request (Semrush API) -> Google Sheets -> Looker Studio

buildability.rationale: Semrush has a well-documented API. HTTP Request node can call it. Google Sheets available.

projects.projectName: Figma to Lovable to HTML/CSS Web Design
projects.problemStatement: Migrating templates manually causes disconnect between design intention and developer execution.
projects.solutionOverview: Figma Dev Mode -> Lovable -> HTML/CSS export for Gutenberg/WordPress

buildability.rationale: This is a design tool pipeline (Figma -> Lovable), not an n8n automation workflow.

projects.problemStatement: Individual contributors not active on LinkedIn. No repeatable system for content publishing.
projects.solutionOverview: Capture content types -> Gemini generates drafts -> lightweight review -> scheduling

buildability.rationale: Google Drive + Gemini + Sheets available. LinkedIn posting API needs HTTP Request.

projects.problemStatement: Time-consuming to get weekly performance view. Manual audits reduce consistency and slow action.
projects.solutionOverview: Schedule -> Google Ads data pull -> Gemini analysis -> anomaly alerts -> Slack summary

buildability.rationale: Google Ads node with credential available in Marketing. Gemini for analysis. Slack for delivery.

projects.problemStatement: Streamline webinar creation process from planning to asset generation.
projects.solutionOverview: Transcript -> extract topics -> create LP/email/social content -> WordPress/HubSpot

buildability.rationale: Google Docs, Sheets available. WordPress needs HTTP Request. Integrates with Nechama's project.
httpRequestWorkarounds: WordPress REST API via HTTP Request

projects.problemStatement: User understanding fragmented and frozen in time. Manual research too slow.
projects.solutionOverview: Transform raw product data into dynamic User Identities with weekly Slack report.

buildability.rationale: Requires product behavioral data not in any documented spec. No tools specified.

projects.problemStatement: Product messaging fragmented across files by multiple team members. No way to find existing assets.
projects.solutionOverview: AI agent that locates all existing assets and aggregates by feature in reverse chronological order.

buildability.rationale: Requires 9+ platforms (Figma, Pendo, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, etc.). Too many missing integrations.
dataNeeded: Messaging docs and assets across all platforms

projects.problemStatement: No automated way to verify if market trends are discussed by leads/customers.
projects.solutionOverview: RSS monitor -> Firecrawl competitors -> Modjo call data -> AI brief -> Slack

buildability.rationale: RSS Read node exists. Firecrawl for scraping. Modjo credential and spec available. Gemini + Slack.

projects.problemStatement: Managing 10 geos across several platforms. Time-consuming to find problems.
projects.solutionOverview: Query BQ data -> create dashboard for performance review

buildability.rationale: Dashboard creation is not an n8n capability. Can query BQ and output to Sheets but not create interactive dashboards.

projects.problemStatement: Manually creates SF dashboards per event, pulls KPIs at 2wk/1mo/3mo/6mo intervals.
projects.solutionOverview: Schedule -> Salesforce query -> Google Sheets update -> Slack notification

buildability.rationale: All nodes available: Schedule, Salesforce, Google Sheets, Slack. Salesforce spec added to Marketing.

projects.problemStatement: Post-campaign analysis manual, inconsistent, often skipped.
projects.solutionOverview: Schedule -> BigQuery (HubSpot data) -> Gemini AI analysis -> Slack/Sheets

buildability.rationale: HubSpot data in BigQuery. Gemini for AI analysis. Slack + Sheets for output.

projects.problemStatement: Internal case study process is manual and takes too long.
projects.solutionOverview: Online form -> AI writes first draft -> content writer QA only

buildability.rationale: Webhook for form input, Gemini for AI draft, Google Docs for output. All available.

projects.problemStatement: Field Marketing manually researches 100+ global events. Info fragmented.
projects.solutionOverview: AI-powered: discover events -> extract details -> standardize -> score -> compare

buildability.rationale: Firecrawl for scraping, Gemini for analysis. But event discovery from scratch is complex.

projects.problemStatement: Comparison pages rely on manual monitoring. Risk of outdated claims.
projects.solutionOverview: Schedule -> scrape competitors -> detect changes -> AI summarize -> Slack report

buildability.rationale: Promoted from Tier 3: Scrape-and-diff template uses Gemini for change detection instead of Code nodes.

projects.problemStatement: No standardized process for MTC updates. 3-day SLA, manual content creation.
projects.solutionOverview: Sheets Trigger -> read Google Doc -> Gemini compliance-focused draft -> write back

buildability.rationale: All nodes available: Sheets Trigger, Google Docs, Gemini, Sheets, Slack.

projects.problemStatement: Manual process to evaluate market conditions per geo. Data not consolidated.
projects.solutionOverview: Multi-stage: events list, SFDC->Sheets, funnel data from BQ, competitor monitoring

buildability.rationale: Stage 2 (SFDC->Sheets) and Stage 3 (BQ->Sheets) buildable. Stage 1+4 need scraping.

projects.problemStatement: Info gathering process failing. Forms bypassed, incomplete data.
projects.solutionOverview: Slack AI agent -> conversational requirements gathering -> Monday.com board population

buildability.rationale: Monday.com node available. Slack available. Gemini for AI. Multi-turn Slack bot complex but doable.

projects.problemStatement: Manually analyzing each influencer campaign monthly. Inconsistent.
projects.solutionOverview: Monthly trigger -> fetch engagement data -> AI analysis -> Slack/Email report

buildability.rationale: YouTube, Instagram, Partnerstack APIs all need HTTP Request. Complex multi-source.

projects.problemStatement: Monthly newsletter requires manual localization into FR, DE, IT, ES.
projects.solutionOverview: Google Docs (English) -> Gemini translate -> HubSpot email modules -> Slack notification

buildability.rationale: Google Docs, Gemini/Translate, Slack all available. Core flow doesn't need Figma.

projects.problemStatement: Too much time creating templetized webinar assets.
projects.solutionOverview: Transcripts + research -> automate LP, emails, PPC ads -> push live -> presentation deck

buildability.rationale: Overlaps with Roberto's. Google Slides not native. Rest (HubSpot, Docs, Drive, Sheets) available.
httpRequestWorkarounds: Google Slides API via HTTP Request

projects.projectName: AI Competitive Intelligence & Website Change Tracker
projects.problemStatement: Competitive analysis manual, inconsistent. No real-time view of competitor shifts.
projects.solutionOverview: Monitor competitor websites -> detect changes -> classify -> weekly digest with insights

buildability.rationale: Promoted from Tier 3: Scrape-and-diff template provides state management via Google Sheets + Gemini comparison.

testCase.name: hack_scrape_and_diff
testCase.note: Uses same template as hack_018. Customize Gemini prompt for classification categories.

projects.problemStatement: Blog content updates time-consuming across ideation, production, review, publication.
projects.solutionOverview: Identify content needing updates -> update it -> publish on WordPress

buildability.rationale: Search Console and WordPress both need HTTP Request. Gemini for content generation.
httpRequestWorkarounds: Search Console + WordPress APIs via HTTP Request

projects.projectName: End to End New Content Production
projects.problemStatement: Creating new content needs lots of data and research x 5 languages.
projects.solutionOverview: Internal data (Modjo) + external (SEO) -> ideas/briefs -> generate -> publish

buildability.rationale: Modjo spec available. But needs Semrush, Search Console, WordPress, Apify. Too many externals.

projects.problemStatement: No visibility into competitor event attendance.
projects.solutionOverview: Scrape for competitor event attendance -> excel comparing vs our attendance

buildability.rationale: Firecrawl for scraping event sponsor pages. Unstructured discovery is complex.

projects.problemStatement: Need all supporting content for a video podcast.
projects.solutionOverview: Upload video -> subtitles, reel proposals, Spotify/YouTube descriptions

buildability.rationale: Video processing requires specialized media APIs not available in n8n.
httpRequestWorkarounds: Could use Whisper API via HTTP Request for transcription

projects.projectName: Automate Test Results to Roadmap Dashboard
projects.problemStatement: Manually inserting info to Monday and Mixpanel then integrating to tests excel.
projects.solutionOverview: One sheet summarizing all tests (Monday) + results (Mixpanel) with uplift data

buildability.rationale: Monday.com available but Mixpanel and VWO have no native nodes or specs.

projects.problemStatement: Many qualitative sources with different perspectives.
projects.solutionOverview: Google Sheets incorporating qualitative data mapped to repetitive points

buildability.rationale: Modjo available but Clarity and Lyssna have no nodes, APIs, or specs.
dataNeeded: Qualitative data from all three tools

projects.problemStatement: 100+ global events. Reporting reactive, attribution inconsistent.
projects.solutionOverview: AI layer: Salesforce + HubSpot -> Gemini analysis -> pipeline by region -> quarterly insights

buildability.rationale: Salesforce + BigQuery (HubSpot) + Gemini + Sheets + Slack. All available. Most complex Tier 1.

projects.problemStatement: No visibility into how users describe Guesty outside of CS.
projects.solutionOverview: Scrape Reddit/forums -> organize by product/sentiment on spreadsheet

buildability.rationale: Firecrawl for scraping. Gemini for sentiment. Google Sheets for output.

projects.problemStatement: No regular visibility into competitor ads and messaging.
projects.solutionOverview: Pull competitor ads + text + dates -> analyze strategy -> generate counter messaging

buildability.rationale: Needs YouTube, Facebook, Google Display, LinkedIn ad APIs + Apify. Too many externals.

projects.problemStatement: Competitors use Guesty brand in their ads.
projects.solutionOverview: Scrape Google SERP for sponsored ads not leading to Guesty -> takedown report

buildability.rationale: Needs SERP scraping (Apify). No native node.
dataNeeded: Google SERP results for brand queries

projects.problemStatement: Hard to see best performing ads and analyze WoW performance.
projects.solutionOverview: Integrate Facebook Ads Manager -> Google Sheets weekly report

buildability.rationale: Facebook Graph API credential exists but Meta Ads reporting requires complex API calls. No spec.
httpRequestWorkarounds: Facebook Marketing API via HTTP Request

projects.problemStatement: Biweekly manual review of competitor release pages. AI summaries lack nuance.
projects.solutionOverview: AI agent monitors competitor releases, classifies by strategic importance

buildability.rationale: Promoted from Tier 3: Scrape-and-diff template provides state management via Google Sheets + Gemini comparison.
dataNeeded: Competitor release page URLs (Google Sheet input)

testCase.name: hack_scrape_and_diff
testCase.note: Uses same template as hack_018. Customize Gemini prompt for release classification by strategic importance.
